title: Why SoundHound AI's (SOUN) Amelia Acquisition Could Pay Off in the Long Run
text: Ladenburg Thalmann analyst Glenn Mattson upgraded SoundHound AI to Buy on August 11, citing strong second-quarter performance that exceeded expectations. The analyst raised his price target to $16 from $9. According to the report, the Amelia acquisition initially concerned investors due to low-margin contracts. However, management expects to phase out these lower-margin deals over the next 18 months. Meanwhile, growth in core business segments is offsetting earlier worries. The analyst believes SoundHound is developing an integrated platform connecting automotive, restaurant, and enterprise customers through voice-AI capabilities. This ecosystem approach could generate new revenue streams through lead generation, positioning the company for sustainable growth beyond the Amelia integration challenges. Mattson justified his upgraded valuation using a 22x multiple on our new 2027 estimate, comparing it favorably to comparable AI companies meeting the rule of 40 performance standard.
